evals.prompt: Tìm chung cư Quận 8 TPHCM, giá 3-5 tỷ, 2-3 phòng ngủ. Xuất ra file Excel và bản đồ HTML tương tác.
evals.expected_output: A two-file deliverable: (1) an xlsx listing with headers Du An/Loai/Khoang Gia/Dien Tich/Phong Ngu/WC/Dia Chi/Quan/Ghi Chu/Link BDS, and (2) a self-contained HTML map rendering numbered markers over TPHCM district polygons.
expectations: Uses scripts/build_search_url.py (or emits a URL matching https://batdongsan.com.vn/ban-can-ho-chung-cu-quan-8?gia_tu=3000&gia_den=5000)
Scrapes with Chrome browser tool (mcp__claude-in-chrome__*), not curl or fetch
Resolves lat/lng for every project (no zeros, all within TPHCM bounding box)
Runs scripts/generate_excel.py to produce the xlsx
Runs scripts/generate_map.py (NOT bash heredoc) to produce the HTML
Generated HTML starts with literal '<!DOCTYPE html>' (not '<\!DOCTYPE html>')
Collects 15-30 unique projects, deduped by name

evals.prompt: Có dự án nào tốt ở Thủ Đức không? Tôi muốn mua nhà phố dưới 10 tỷ.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers on a casual Vietnamese query, interviews for missing criteria if needed, then runs the full scrape → Excel → map workflow scoped to Thu Duc with nha-rieng type and price<=10000 triệu.
expectations: Skill activates on casual phrasing ('có dự án nào tốt')
Recognizes 'nhà phố' maps to --type nha-rieng and 'Thủ Đức' maps to --district thu-duc
Encodes 'dưới 10 tỷ' as gia_den=10000 with no gia_tu
Uses scripts/generate_map.py so the HTML DOCTYPE is intact
Districts in output listings use canonical key 'Thu Duc' (no diacritics)

evals.prompt: So sánh giá chung cư giữa Quận 7 và Quận 2. Output folder: C:/Users/LN/Downloads
evals.expected_output: Merged dataset covering both districts with a single combined Excel + map. Map shows markers across both district polygons; side panel has separate filter buttons for Q.7 and Q.2 (Thu Duc).
expectations: Scrapes batdongsan.com.vn for both districts (two URLs via build_search_url.py)
Combines results into one projects JSON array
Map side panel filter buttons include both districts
validate_projects.py would pass on the input (if invoked)
